S6 quarterly conformance re-audit cadence (CONTRIBUTING.md §Quarterly Re-Audit + docs/audits/SCHEDULE.md: every 3 months OR every 5 milestones, next 2026-07-17). Plus T9 (CONTRIBUTING.md §Process Safeguards index) + 19-test claim-evidence vitest pinning + biome lint clean (0 errors / 24 warnings baseline preserved) + typecheck clean across 6 packages + full vitest 1237/1237 in 21.43s. targets.phase56SurfaceArea: Conformance audit (M-A) ~200–400 rows + triage (M-B) per-row dispositions + safeguards (M-E) 6 deliverables + backend backfill (M-C) migrations/IPC/repos for restore rows + UI backfill (M-D) components/hooks/routes for restore rows + docs truth-up (M-F) three-bucket CLAUDE.md rewrite + ship (M-G) branch deletion + version bump + retrospective
targets.phase56NonGoals: No new features beyond restoration. No scope creep from mid-flight discoveries without change-control mini-gate (§14.3). No silent deferrals. No Phase 6 work until M-G ships. No public README/landing-site claim updates — those wait for M-F.

sprintFramework.backlog: M-B triage output — audit doc `disposition` column. Must-have=restore / Should-have=replace / Won't-have=deprecate (docs only)
sprintFramework.velocity: Per-sub-milestone Loki exit-KPI: unitTests delta, e2eSpecs delta, atomic:ledger commit ratio (target 1:1), estimate-vs-actual duration variance
sprintFramework.changeControl: Mid-flight gap → STOP current task → add audit-doc row → triage → Rocky approval → resume with expanded scope recorded; no silent growth (R7 mitigation)
sprintFramework.dor: Sprint entry gate: audit rows categorized for sub-milestone, filesTouched estimated, testsDeltaEstimate recorded, verification recipe enumerated, predecessor Loki exit-KPI closed
sprintFramework.dod: Sprint exit gate: M-E.1 milestone DoD template (ships in M-E as S1). Until M-E ships, M-A and M-B use interim DoD inline with their acceptance blocks

notes: PHASE 5.6 M-B SHIPPED 2026-04-17 — atomic docs(phase-5.6-m-b) commit 6b5d481 lands this session; paired chore(loki) ledger follows. Deliverable: audit-doc amendment — 41 distinct gap rows now carry restore/replace/deprecate disposition + one-sentence justification (27 restore / 14 deprecate / 0 replace); §17 cross-check EXECUTED (10-row independent grep/find sweep against main HEAD 8729e40, 10/10 confirmed, zero diffs from M-A matrix, plus 3 bonus sanity re-checks on shipped-claim rows); §20 disposition rollup appended with per-cluster scoping (Cluster A 7 rows ALL restore / Cluster B 8 rows ALL restore / Cluster C 2 chat-tab restore rows / M-E verify-gate 5 rows / M-F docs-only 14 rows); residual risks + escalation triggers enumerated; §21 renamed from prior §20 Cross-references. Rocky's mid-M-A correction confirmed formally — both P0 clusters unambiguously RESTORE. Count reconciliation note: §1.2 rolls 49 severity tags across non-shipped rows; §20.1 rolls 41 distinct gap rows (8-row gap is M-A authorial bookkeeping in §18 convenience rollup + §1.1 counters). 41-row count is the operational decision surface. Head-of-queue advances to Phase 5.6 M-E (Process Safeguards, 2-3d + 1d buffer) per approved §13.2 reorder — safeguards ship BEFORE M-C/M-D so the backfill runs under live CI + pre-commit + DoD template + Loki verifiedBy + branch policy + quarterly cadence.

PHASE 5.6 M-A SHIPPED 2026-04-17 — atomic docs(phase-5.6-m-a) commit 1f3c432 + paired chore(loki) ledger f040d11. Deliverable: NEW docs/audits/2026-04-17-conformance-audit.md (414 rows, schema-compliant per plan §4). Status distribution: 350 shipped / 19 partial / 16 missing / 8 unverifiable. Severity rollup (non-shipped only): 15 P0 / 8 P1 / 10 P2 / 16 P3. Two P0 clusters both stranded on worktree-phase-2-the-org: Cluster A (Rocky's LOCKED multi-company M7 design, 7 rows) + Cluster B (M9 org chart, 8 rows). Scope-expansion mini-gate INVOKED ONCE mid-authoring when Rocky corrected Cluster A P1 → P0 (disposition deprecate → restore; CLAUDE.md Troubleshooting 'aspirational' framing flagged for M-F rewrite per audit §18.5). Cross-check §17 addendum now closed by M-B in the same-day amendment.

PHASE 5.6 KICKOFF 2026-04-17 (approved + executing under Rocky's direction). Trigger: pre-M36-T2 audit surfaced that the Phase 5.5 hotfix (role-pack reconciliation) corrected symptoms of a deeper problem — systemic drift between CLAUDE.md status-block claims and on-disk reality across Phases 1–5 (M7 ~30% shipped, M9 ~10%, M11 partially; IPC channels and repo surfaces listed but not on main; UI tabs marked disabled:true). Root cause (5-whys in plan §3): no automated verification between 'implementer claims complete' and 'ledger says complete'. Symptom-not-cause fix would mean the same drift recurs at M40/M50/M60. Phase 5.6 is a Definition-of-Done failure repair operation with 7 sub-milestones A–G and 6 process safeguards S1–S6.

M-E (Process Safeguards) REORDERED TO SHIP BEFORE M-C/M-D (architectural change from §8 original proposal, approved 2026-04-17 per §13.2). Safeguards ship in Week 2 alongside M-B triage; backfill (M-C Week 3, M-D Week 4) then runs under live CI conformance check + pre-commit hook + DoD template + Loki verifiedBy field + branch policy + quarterly re-audit cadence. The backfill becomes the first proof that the safeguards work.

M36 T2+ EXPLICITLY PAUSED per D8. M36 T0 (plan doc dc8d4d3) + M36 T1 (capability taxonomy enum 52ac886) both on origin/main — preserved, no rollback. Resume at M36 T2 (role-schema parser extension) when Phase 5.6 M-G retrospective is committed and v1.1.1 is tagged. Rocky manually removes the m36PausedState block from this file at that point.

BRANCH worktree-phase-2-the-org PRESERVED THROUGH M-G per D6. Contains 4 unmerged commits (+8203 / −236 across 69 files) with M7 multi-company workspace + CRUD, M8 role pack system (the 20 stranded role.md files now landed on main via Phase 5.5 hotfix), role harmonization, and M9 org chart + hire/fire/promote UI. Branch deletion gated on M-G audit cross-check showing zero remaining restore rows.

PMP/AGILE/SCRUM FRAMEWORK active from Phase 5.6 M-A onward per plan §14: Product Backlog (from M-B triage), Sprint Velocity (Loki exit-KPI), Change Control Mini-Gate (for mid-flight scope), Definition of Ready (sprint entry gate), Definition of Done (sprint exit gate via M-E.1 template once shipped). NEXT SESSION: open M-A T0 per current-task.json. M-A builds docs/audits/2026-04-XX-conformance-audit.md — evidence matrix with one row per CLAUDE.md status-block claim, per plan §4 methodology. Every row has file:line reference or literal 'missing', severity P0/P1/P2/P3, and eventual disposition in M-B. Target 200–400 rows. Time-box 5 working days + 2 days buffer.

(3) pnpm typecheck clean across 6 packages. (4) pnpm lint 0 errors / ≤24 warnings (baseline preserved). (5) Electron ABI rebuild for Playwright. (6) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e baseline + restore deltas. (7) Sub-milestone audit-doc row updates committed. (8) Loki verifiedBy block closed on ledger commit. Atomic + ledger commit cadence preserved.
